items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for tax-exemption support.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of tax-exemption support where applicable, but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or details regarding tax-exemption handling. While there are multiple passed steps indicating successful bookings and financial validations, none of them directly address the requirement for tax-exemption support, leading to an inconclusive status. The prior step evidence does not provide concrete information on how tax-exemption is applied or validated in the context of the bookings made.
